summary: Iteration 53 - Collaboration Hub feature testing complete. All backend endpoints (20/20 tests passed) and frontend UI verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/collab-hub/posts requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/collab-hub/my-posts requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/collab-hub/posts requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/collab-hub/invites requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/collab-hub/posts creates post with all fields
Backend: POST /api/collab-hub/posts creates post with minimal fields
Backend: GET /api/collab-hub/posts returns list of open posts
Backend: GET /api/collab-hub/posts?looking_for=mixer filters by role
Backend: GET /api/collab-hub/posts?genre=Pop filters by genre
Backend: GET /api/collab-hub/my-posts returns user's own posts
Backend: PUT /api/collab-hub/posts/{id} updates post status
Backend: PUT /api/collab-hub/posts/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent
Backend: DELETE /api/collab-hub/posts/{id} deletes post
Backend: DELETE /api/collab-hub/posts/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent
Backend: GET /api/collab-hub/invites returns received and sent arrays
Backend: POST /api/collab-hub/invite fails for own post (400)
Backend: POST /api/collab-hub/invite fails for nonexistent post (404)
Backend: PUT /api/collab-hub/invites/{id} fails with invalid action (400)
Backend: PUT /api/collab-hub/invites/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent
Backend: Browse posts endpoint works
Frontend: Login with admin@kalmori.com works
Frontend: Navigate to /collab-hub via sidebar link
Frontend: Page shows 'Collaboration Hub' title
Frontend: Browse, My Posts, Invites tabs visible
Frontend: Role filter dropdown (filter-role) works
Frontend: Genre filter dropdown (filter-genre) works
Frontend: Post Opportunity button opens create-post-modal
Frontend: Create post form has all fields (title, looking_for, genre, budget, description, deadline)
Frontend: Submit post shows toast and post appears in My Posts
Frontend: My Posts tab shows user's created posts
Frontend: Close post button changes status to closed
Frontend: Delete button present on My Posts
Frontend: Invites tab shows Received and Sent sections
Frontend: Send Invite button opens invite-modal
Frontend: Invite modal has message field and Send button
Frontend: Can't invite yourself validation works
Frontend: Sidebar has Collab Hub link with Lightning icon
seed_data_creation: Test posts created during testing were cleaned up. Existing post 'Need a vocalist for R&B track' preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 tested Collaboration Hub feature. All collab-hub CRUD endpoints working. Posts stored in collab_posts collection, invites in collab_invites collection. Frontend page at /collab-hub with Browse, My Posts, Invites tabs. Filters work for role and genre. Create post modal has all fields. Close/delete post works from My Posts tab. Invite modal opens from Browse tab. Can't invite yourself validation works. Sidebar link uses Lightning icon.

endpoints.POST /api/collab-hub/posts: Creates collaboration post with title, looking_for, genre, description, budget, deadline
endpoints.GET /api/collab-hub/posts: Returns open posts with optional looking_for and genre filters
endpoints.POST /api/collab-hub/invite: Sends invite to post owner (validates not own post)
endpoints.PUT /api/collab-hub/invites/{id}: Accept/decline invite (updates post status on accept)

frontend_features.filters: Role dropdown (8 roles), Genre dropdown (12 genres)
frontend_features.create_post_modal: Title, Looking For (role buttons), Genre, Budget, Description, Deadline
frontend_features.post_cards: Shows title, artist, role badge, genre, budget, deadline, responses count, Send Invite button
frontend_features.my_posts: Shows posts with status badge, Close button (for open), Delete button
frontend_features.invites: Received section with Accept/Decline, Sent section with status
